data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 6 (ADVANCED) — severity=2 (CI blocks PR merge), complexity=1 (non-obvious cross-layer: ticket-lib.sh+subshell+set -euo pipefail), environment=1 (CI Alpine Docker only), intermittent=0 (deterministic), prior-fix-attempts=+2 (65d6c900dc partially addressed env var but not in library function). Root cause hypothesis: write_commit_event calls git rev-parse --show-toplevel unconditionally without GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1; fails in Alpine Docker volume mount; set -euo pipefail in ticket_create subshell propagates exit silently.
